[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / width

# Accessor: width

## Get Signature

```ts
get width(): number;
```

Width of the final ASCII framebuffer in pixels.

Returns `0` before the layer is initialized.

### Returns

`number`

### Example
